line.token: * Service for sending email notifications using Symfony Mailer
* Supports SMTP configuration for various email providers
* Load SMTP configuration from database or config.php
// Override with database settings if available
* @param string $to Email address to send to
* @param string $body Email body (HTML or plain text)
* Protected to allow mocking in tests
* Send GDPR data request confirmation email to user
body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }
.header { background: #3c8dbc; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; }
We will process your request within 30 days as required by GDPR.
If you did not make this request, please contact us immediately.
This is an automated message from Blogware.
* Send notification to admin about new data request
body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }
.header { background: #f0ad4e; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; }
A new GDPR data request has been submitted:
Please review and process this request in the admin panel.
'Your personal data has been anonymized as requested.'
'Your data export is ready for download.'
body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }
.header { background: #5cb85c; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; }
If you have any questions, please contact us.
body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }
.header { background: #d9534f; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; }
Your profile has been permanently deleted from our system.
As per GDPR requirements, your personal data has been anonymized.
If you did not request this, please contact us immediately.
* Get SMTP configuration (for admin settings page)
